name: AWS VPC Network
description: Production-ready AWS VPC with public and private subnets across multiple Availability Zones, Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway, route tables, network ACLs, and optional VPC Flow Logs. Provides a secure foundation for deploying workloads in AWS.
architectureSummary: Creates a VPC with configurable CIDR block, 2 public subnets and 2 private subnets spread across Availability Zones for high availability. Public subnets have an Internet Gateway with direct internet access. Private subnets route internet traffic through a NAT Gateway (optionally single or per-AZ). VPC Flow Logs capture network traffic metadata to CloudWatch for monitoring and auditing.
securityNotes: Private subnets have no direct inbound internet access. Network ACLs provide subnet-level firewall rules. VPC Flow Logs (when enabled) capture all accepted and rejected traffic for security auditing. NAT Gateway enables outbound-only internet access for private subnet resources. Default security group blocks all inbound traffic.

versions.changelog: Initial release with VPC, public/private subnets, Internet Gateway, NAT Gateway, route tables, network ACLs, and VPC Flow Logs.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy the VPC into.

inputs.name: vpc_cidr
inputs.label: VPC CIDR Block
inputs.description: The CIDR block for the VPC (e.g., 10.0.0.0/16).

inputs.name: public_subnet_cidrs
inputs.label: Public Subnet CIDRs
inputs.description: Comma-separated CIDR blocks for public subnets (one per AZ).

inputs.name: private_subnet_cidrs
inputs.label: Private Subnet CIDRs
inputs.description: Comma-separated CIDR blocks for private subnets (one per AZ).

inputs.name: enable_nat_gateway
inputs.label: Enable NAT Gateway
inputs.description: Enable a NAT Gateway for private subnet internet access.

inputs.name: single_nat_gateway
inputs.label: Single NAT Gateway
inputs.description: Use a single NAT Gateway instead of one per AZ (reduces cost, lower availability).

inputs.name: enable_flow_logs
inputs.label: Enable VPC Flow Logs
inputs.description: Enable VPC Flow Logs to capture network traffic metadata to CloudWatch.

outputs.name: vpc_cidr_block
outputs.description: The CIDR block of the VPC.

outputs.name: internet_gateway_id
outputs.description: The ID of the Internet Gateway.

outputs.name: nat_gateway_ids
outputs.description: List of NAT Gateway IDs (if enabled).

outputs.name: public_route_table_id
outputs.description: The ID of the public route table.

outputs.name: private_route_table_ids
outputs.description: List of private route table IDs.
